title: South Carolina
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in South Carolina

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in South Carolina

You can apply for Medicaid in South Carolina by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in South Carolina

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in South Carolina

Health Insurance Marketplace® in South Carolina

CHIP in South Carolina

Healthy Connections covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for Healthy Connections right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about Healthy Connections in South Carolina.
